title: Jaytrixia
description:
✨ Hi! 70% of the videos on this channel are all about my gacha pulls. Whether I lose the 50/50 or hit hard pity, I still post it all!
✨ Also, about 80% of my gacha games are F2P. The others are paid, but only for the monthly pass (Genshin, HSR, Arknights: Endfield) and one battle pass (Wuwa).
✨ Aight, I mostly post Limbus Company gameplay videos. I love this game for its unique  gameplay, music, and peak story ending. Also, Limbus is my top-viewed gacha content, followed by Wuthering Waves in second, and Zenless Zone Zero in third.
✨ If you enjoy gacha content, please subscribe to my channel. Sankyuu~ 

▶️ 1st YT: Dalmanski GD
🔗 https://www.youtube.com/@dalmanskigd

▶️ My Games ID is on this website I created.
ⓘ I created my own Jaymantrix AI, start chatting with me (With limits due to Free Tier):
🔗 https://jaymantrix-website.vercel.app/
